message.content:
@startuml
' NOTE: The provided image is extremely high-density and the text is not legible enough to accurately reproduce every message label and fragment.
' Below is a best-effort structural reproduction of the visible lifelines and major combined fragments.

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #333
  LifeLineBorderColor #999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor #999
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #f7f7f7
  BoxBorderColor #999
  BoxBackgroundColor white
  GroupBorderColor #666
  GroupBackgroundColor white
  MessageAlign left
}

title purchase() sequence (approx.)

participant "wapPurchase\n(前端)" as wapPurchase
participant "ms-trade" as msTrade
participant "subscribe-service" as subscribeService
participant "ctu" as ctu
participant "payment-service" as paymentService
participant "cpm" as cpm
participant "payment" as payment
participant "upm" as upm
participant "public-service" as publicService
participant "product" as product
participant "subscribe" as subscribe
participant "charging" as charging
participant "order" as order
participant "proxy" as proxy
participant "campaign" as campaign

wapPurchase -> msTrade : purchase() 请求
msTrade -> subscribeService : purchase() 业务处理

group 获取/刷新连续包Token缓存
  alt 缓存不存在/过期
    subscribeService -> subscribeService : queryContinuousTokenMemCache\n(查询缓存)
    subscribeService -> subscribeService : updateContinuousTokenMemCache\n(刷新缓存)
  else 缓存有效
    subscribeService -> subscribeService : queryContinuousTokenMemCache\n(命中缓存)
  end
end

group 获取/创建支付账户
  subscribeService -> paymentService : getPaymentAccountInfo()
  paymentService -> cpm : getPaymentAccountInfo()
  alt 支付账户不存在
    subscribeService -> paymentService : createPaymentAccount()
    paymentService -> cpm : createPaymentAccount()
  else 支付账户已存在
    subscribeService <-- paymentService : accountInfo
  end
end

group 参数校验/匹配
  alt 参数不合法
    subscribeService --> msTrade : 返回错误
  else 参数合法
    subscribeService -> publicService : matchNumberSegment()
    subscribeService -> publicService : matchNumberSegment()
  end
end

group 订阅/下单主流程
  alt 新订阅
    subscribeService -> subscribe : fetchSubscription()
    subscribeService -> subscribe : subscribe()
    subscribeService -> subscribe : authenticate()
    alt 价格计算
      subscribeService -> product : calculatePrice()
      group 支付渠道适配
        subscribeService -> paymentService : autoAdaptPayChannels()
        subscribeService -> paymentService : autoAdaptPayChannels()
      end
    end
    subscribeService -> order : createOrder()
  else 续订/变更
    subscribeService -> subscribe : authenticate()
    subscribeService -> product : calculatePrice()
    group 支付渠道适配
      subscribeService -> paymentService : autoAdaptPayChannels()
      subscribeService -> paymentService : autoAdaptPayChannels()
    end
    subscribeService -> order : createOrder()
    subscribeService -> order : submitOrder()
  end
end

group 支付
  alt 直付
    subscribeService -> paymentService : directPayment()
    paymentService -> payment : directPayment()
    paymentService -> upm : directPayment()
  else 代扣/异步
    subscribeService -> paymentService : payOrder()
    paymentService -> payment : payOrder()
  end
end

group 回调/通知与补偿
  subscribeService -> subscribe : batchSubscribe()
  subscribeService -> order : batchFetchHistoryOrders()
  subscribeService -> paymentService : payNotifyStatus()
  subscribeService -> proxy : topic=itemPurchase_tags=Main
  proxy -> campaign : lotteryCampaignService.setLotteryInfo()
  group 连续包扣费
    subscribeService -> charging : runContinuousCharging()
    subscribeService -> charging : runContinuousCharging()
  end
end

msTrade <-- subscribeService : purchase() 响应
wapPurchase <-- msTrade : purchase() 返回

@enduml
